businessQuestion: Which categories contribute the highest markdown losses?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DP.CATEGORY,
    SUM(FMC.MARKDOWN_DOLLAR_IMPACT) AS MARKDOWN_LOSS,
    AVG(FMC.MARKDOWN_DEPTH_PCT) AS AVG_MARKDOWN_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_MARKDOWN_CLEARANCE FMC
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
ON FMC.PRODUCT_KEY=DP.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MARKDOWN_LOSS DESC;
businessContext: Pricing teams want to minimize discount-driven margin erosion.
